highlights.text: My lean today was we try to work towards that.
I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is ES can do more back-testing.
They are highly predictable and all sharp squeezes in ES are caused by the same thing: A Failed Breakdown or Level Reclaim.
My core edge is trading these rips via Failed Breakdowns.
Readers were prepared and on the lookout for the Failed Breakdown and short squeeze.

Again not interested in bidding, but if 6543 holds and recovers 6553 this is a long.” On Friday at 10:40AM we tested 6543, recovered 6553 shortly after, and were off to the races (this setup was a re-test of a big Failed Breakdown that occurred at 5:30AM Friday morning - which I discussed extensively on Friday).
A big Failed Breakdown starts a rally leg, but to continue it, bulls need to recover major previously lost supports.

post_title: ThanksGiving Week Starts With A Bang For SPX. More Upside Ahead? November 25 Plan
